channel.title: Housejester Blog
channel.description: Latest articles from Housejester — UK furniture, interior design, and home improvement guides

item.title: The Broken Floor Plan Transition: Why Homes in 2026 Are Quietly Breaking Up With Open Concept Layouts
item.description: 48.8% of homeowners prefer traditional layouts. Glass partitions, furniture zoning, and flooring transitions are replacing the open-concept mega-room.

item.title: 10 Best Modern Fitted Kitchen Designs for Small Homes in 2026 (Smart Layouts That Make Tiny Kitchens Feel Huge)
item.description: 79% of designers recommend eliminating dining rooms. 10 fitted kitchen designs with smart storage, layered lighting, and nature-inspired colours for compact UK homes.

item.title: Budget-Friendly Kitchen Cabinet Upgrades: 10 Ideas for UK Homeowners in 2026
item.description: Kitchen renovations offer 60-80% ROI. 10 affordable cabinet upgrades from repainting to glass panels — with UK costs, DIY tips, and 2026 trends.

item.title: 10 Budget-Friendly Kitchen Cabinet Upgrades UK Homeowners Are Choosing in 2026
item.description: The median UK minor kitchen renovation costs £4,900. From handle swaps to glass doors — 10 cabinet upgrades with pricing for every option.

item.title: 2026 Directory of Top-Rated Interior Design & Home Specialists in London
item.description: Connecting London homeowners with verified local experts. 472,000+ UK companies, 7,000+ London listings, 21 categories. 2026 rates, trends and borough-level data.

item.title: 10 Budget-Friendly Kitchen Cabinet Upgrades UK Homeowners Are Choosing in 2026
item.description: The median UK minor kitchen renovation costs £4,900. Discover 10 budget-friendly cabinet upgrades that refresh your kitchen without a full overhaul.

item.title: The Broken Floor Plan Transition: Why Homes in 2026 Are Breaking Up With Open Concept
item.description: 48.8% of homeowners now prefer traditional layouts over open concept. Discover the broken floor plan trend — zoned spaces using archways, glass partitions, and smart dividers.

item.title: 10 Best Modern Fitted Kitchen Designs for Small Homes in 2026 (Smart Layouts That Make Tiny Kitchens Feel Huge)
item.description: 79% of designers recommend eliminating the dining room to maximise kitchen space. 10 smart fitted kitchen layouts for compact UK homes.

item.title: Home Office Furniture & Ergonomics: 10 Smart Upgrades That Make Remote Work Actually Comfortable in 2026
item.description: 78% of remote workers say their home setup needs improvement. Discover 10 smart upgrades from ergonomic chairs to adjustable desks.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Kitchen Renovation Contractor Near You in 2026 (Avoid Costly Mistakes)
item.description: 75% of homeowners underestimate kitchen renovation timelines. Learn how to find verified contractors, compare quotes, and avoid costly mistakes.

item.title: 10 Best Modern Fitted Kitchen Designs for Small Homes (2026 Guide That Actually Saves Space)
item.description: Actual space-saving fitted kitchen designs for compact UK homes in 2026.

item.title: Birmingham & West Midlands 2026 Home Renovation Resource Guide
item.description: The definitive local directory for finding verified bathroom fitters, flooring specialists, and trade professionals across Birmingham, Solihull, and the West Midlands.

item.title: Manchester Home Improvement Hub: 2026 Verified Trade & Furniture Directory
item.description: Connecting Greater Manchester homeowners with 472,000+ UK businesses. Navigate the 2026 renovation market with verified expertise in kitchens, bathrooms, flooring, and bespoke furniture.

item.title: Industrial Luxe Furniture Trends 2026: The Best Warehouse-Style Living Ideas for Modern UK Homes
item.description: Industrial interiors are no longer just about exposed brick. Discover the latest warehouse-style living ideas for modern UK homes in 2026.
